In any case, it should be refreshed to see if we can get PPC setstripe working properly.

parents.subject: LU-9859 libcfs: replace cfs_get_random_bytes calls with get_random_byte()

commit.subject: LU-00000 tests: convert LOV EA user data into little-endian form
commit.message:
LU-00000 tests: convert LOV EA user data into little-endian form

This patch is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly trivial envdefinitions=SANITY_EXCEPT=27H clientarch=ppc64

Change-Id: If7ca70b8c92292187e6594c8be46d960d3021ba5
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
